text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.autoRefi: Automatically moves Wind Charges and Fireworks from inventory to hotbar
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.aimSpeed: Standard camera rotation speed towards target (1-50)
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.elytraAi: Faster camera rotation speed while dive-bombing with elytra (1-100)
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.playerOn: Aim assist will ignore mobs and only lock onto players
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.smartLoc: Aim assist will automatically target the enemy with the lowest health and armor
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.axeSwapE: Hits shield with axe, but instantly swaps to mace if the enemy is not blocking
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.allowAxe: Allows toggling the Shield Break mode via hotkey
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.bypassSh: Your mace attacks will completely bypass the enemy's shield block
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.elytraLa: Auto-equips elytra, launches with firework, and re-equips armor when near target
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.elytraAu: Automatically strikes the enemy when in range during an elytra dive
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.elytraWi: Waits for the mace upward bounce, equips elytra, and rockets directly towards the enemy
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.tridentM: When locked on and right clicking with a Riptide Trident, it automatically launches you up, then dives at the target and swaps to your mace
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.tridentA: Automatically strikes the enemy when in range after a trident dive
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.tridentW: Waits for the mace upward bounce, auto-equips trident, and dashes again
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.autoWind: Throws a wind charge on fall or interact
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.windFall: How many blocks you need to fall to trigger the auto wind charge
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.autoMlgE: Automatically uses a wind charge or water under you to prevent deadly fall damage
text.autoconfig.maceswap.option.mlgFallT: Lethal height at which Auto-MLG will trigger (in blocks)
maceswap.discord.title: Join our Discord server!
maceswap.discord.message: Visit our Modrinth page to join the community!
